name: Charles Haunted Mansion
short_description: Charles Haunted Mansion is a 2D Top-Down Survival Horror game based on the story of a mansion, haunted by the vengeful spirit of a woman and demons.
detailed_description:
Charles Haunted Mansion is a 2D Top-Down Survival Horror game based on the story of a mansion, haunted by the vengeful spirit of a woman and demons.

Charles Mansion was built in 1956 in Ohio which was owned by a rich businessman called Charles, who used to live in that mansion with his family. However, there have been some tragic incidents occurred inside the mansion one after another. It was said that the son of the businessman died by falling down the stairs of the mansion. His spirit was often observed in the hallway area. Charles's younger sister, Anna, was in a relationship with a guy called Henry, who was originally from the downtown of Ohio. He used to visit her from time to time. But the relationship between them worsened as the time went by. Consequently, Anna decided to end the relationship. Henry could not accept that and wanted to take a revenge. On the following day, he entered the mansion impersonating a servant and murdered her in cold blood by dragging her to the attic area of the mansion.

Her spirit is often seen in the attic area and the crying sounds can be heard from time to time. Her restless spirit is looking for revenge even today. The tragic incidents attracted other Evil creatures which is said to reside in the basement area of the mansion. It is also said that there is a portal somewhere in the mansion which is acting as a gateway for the various other spirits.

You play as David, a paranormal enthusiast, and your mission is to investigate the mansion for experiencing the paranormal. Will you be able to escape the mansion alive?

Are you ready to accept the challenge? You have to survive at any cost!

Key Features:

  • Explore the entire mansion!
  • Collect items like red gems, keys etc.
  • Come face to face with the unrest souls and the demons!
  • Explore the spirit world and avoid traps like spikes, fire, lava etc.
  • Discover the secret areas of the spirit world!
  • About half an hour of paranormal investigation.

Warning:

This game contains flashing lights which may not be suitable for people with epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions. Player discretion is advised.


Note: I am a solo indie game developer and I have done all of the graphics, artwork, animation, programming, character designing except for the music. I hope you will enjoy the game.
